context: Tests whether the agent uses correct Confluent serializer class names, includes the Confluent Maven repository, configures specific Avro record deserialization, uses the correct subject naming strategy class paths, and writes valid Avro optional field syntax.

checklist.name: KafkaAvroSerializer class
checklist.description: ProducerConfig.java references `io.confluent.kafka.serializers.KafkaAvroSerializer` as the value serializer class

checklist.name: KafkaAvroDeserializer class
checklist.description: ConsumerConfig.java references `io.confluent.kafka.serializers.KafkaAvroDeserializer` as the value deserializer class

checklist.name: schema.registry.url set
checklist.description: Both ProducerConfig.java and ConsumerConfig.java set the `schema.registry.url` property

checklist.name: specific.avro.reader=true
checklist.description: ConsumerConfig.java sets `specific.avro.reader` to `true` (enabling deserialization into generated specific record classes)

checklist.name: Confluent Maven repository
checklist.description: pom.xml includes the Confluent repository with URL `https://packages.confluent.io/maven/`

checklist.name: kafka-avro-serializer dependency
checklist.description: pom.xml includes a dependency on `kafka-avro-serializer` (groupId io.confluent)

checklist.name: Avro Maven plugin included
checklist.description: pom.xml includes the avro-maven-plugin (groupId org.apache.avro) configured for schema code generation

checklist.name: Optional field union type
checklist.description: The `notes` field in ParcelScanEvent.avsc uses a union type starting with null, e.g. ["null", "string"]

checklist.name: Default null for optional field
checklist.description: The `notes` field has `"default": null` matching the first type in the union

checklist.name: RecordNameStrategy explanation
checklist.description: design_notes.md explains that RecordNameStrategy scopes the subject by record name (not topic), making it suitable when multiple event types share a topic
